description: Style NoteComfortable, casual dressing at it's best, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and casual shoes.Product DetailsBlack polo T-shirt, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two button chest placket, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with similar colours at 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
